30: func (p *DynConfBuilder) build(ctx context.Context, containersInspected []dockerData) *dynamic.Configuration {
31: 	configurations := make(map[string]*dynamic.Configuration)
32: 
33: 	for _, container := range containersInspected {
34: 		containerName := getServiceName(container) + "-" + container.ID
35: 
36: 		logger := log.Ctx(ctx).With().Str("container", containerName).Logger()
37: 		ctxContainer := logger.WithContext(ctx)

39: 		if !p.keepContainer(ctxContainer, container) {
40: 			continue

43: 		confFromLabel, err := label.DecodeConfiguration(container.Labels)
44: 		if err != nil {
45: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
46: 			continue
47: 		}
48: 
49: 		var tcpOrUDP bool
50: 		if len(confFromLabel.TCP.Routers) > 0 || len(confFromLabel.TCP.Services) > 0 {
51: 			tcpOrUDP = true
52: 
53: 			err := p.buildTCPServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.TCP)
54: 			if err != nil {
55: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
56: 				continue
57: 			}
58: 			provider.BuildTCPRouterConfiguration(ctxContainer, confFromLabel.TCP)
59: 		}
60: 
61: 		if len(confFromLabel.UDP.Routers) > 0 || len(confFromLabel.UDP.Services) > 0 {
62: 			tcpOrUDP = true
63: 
64: 			err := p.buildUDPServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.UDP)
65: 			if err != nil {
66: 				logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
67: 				continue
68: 			}
69: 			provider.BuildUDPRouterConfiguration(ctxContainer, confFromLabel.UDP)
70: 		}
71: 
72: 		if tcpOrUDP && len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Routers) == 0 &&
73: 			len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Middlewares) == 0 &&
74: 			len(confFromLabel.HTTP.Services) == 0 {
75: 			configurations[containerName] = confFromLabel
76: 			continue
77: 		}
78: 
79: 		err = p.buildServiceConfiguration(ctxContainer, container, confFromLabel.HTTP)
80: 		if err != nil {
81: 			logger.Error().Err(err).Send()
82: 			continue
83: 		}

86: 
87: 		model := struct {
88: 			Name          string
89: 			ContainerName string

91: 		}{

288: func (p *DynConfBuilder) getIPPort(ctx context.Context, container dockerData, serverPort string) (string, string, error) {
289: 	logger := log.Ctx(ctx)
290: 
291: 	var ip, port string
292: 	usedBound := false
293: 
294: 	if p.UseBindPortIP {
295: 		portBinding, err := p.getPortBinding(container, serverPort)
296: 		switch {
297: 		case err != nil:
298: 			logger.Info().Msgf("Unable to find a binding for container %q, falling back on its internal IP/Port.", container.Name)
299: 		case portBinding.HostIP == "0.0.0.0" || len(portBinding.HostIP) == 0:
300: 			logger.Info().Msgf("Cannot determine the IP address (got %q) for %q's binding, falling back on its internal IP/Port.", portBinding.HostIP, container.Name)
301: 		default:
302: 			ip = portBinding.HostIP
303: 			port = portBinding.HostPort
304: 			usedBound = true
305: 		}
306: 	}
307: 
308: 	if !usedBound {
309: 		ip = p.getIPAddress(ctx, container)
310: 		port = getPort(container, serverPort)
311: 	}
312: 
313: 	if len(ip) == 0 {
314: 		return "", "", fmt.Errorf("unable to find the IP address for the container %q: the server is ignored", container.Name)
315: 	}
316: 
317: 	return ip, port, nil
318: }

65: // Provide allows the docker provider to provide configurations to traefik using the given configuration channel.

67: 	pool.GoCtx(func(routineCtx context.Context) {
68: 		logger := log.Ctx(routineCtx).With().Str(logs.ProviderName, swarmName).Logger()

70: 
71: 		operation := func() error {
